title: PDF Viewer scrollbar gutter reserve (dbg73)
description:
PipeSync PDF Viewer fit width now reserves vertical scrollbar gutter even when the scrollbar is absent during pre-fit layout measure. Previously fit used scroll inner width minus a live gutter that was often 0 during measure, so content scaled to full column width and the scrollbar overlaid the right edge after fit.

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg73). Open PDF Viewer with multi-page PDFs: pages should fit inside the scroll viewport without clipping behind the vertical scrollbar.
changeLog: avail = raw - max(measuredGutter, minReserve) - inset (no double-subtract).
Two-pass refit when post-fit gutter exceeds reserve.
H7 ingest: scrollbarReserve, postFit scrollClientW vs zoomportW.
